prestazioni: Replace the 1.6L MZR-DISI (LF-VE) engine with a fully built 2.3L MZR-DISI (L3-VDT) from the Mazdaspeed3, featuring a forged internals kit by Tomei (pistons, connecting rods, and crankshaft), paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, custom 4-inch intake piping with a K&N cold air intake, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 28 psi of boost targeting 450 whp on E85 fuel

Install a custom 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS with a 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system featuring a Burns Stainless muffler and a custom X-pipe for optimized scavenging, paired with a Mazdaspeed3 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gear set and a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch

Upgrade the OEM RX-8-based rear-wheel-drive platform with a custom KAAZ 1.5-way mechanical limited-slip differential, Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, and a full Cusco bolt-on roll cage with integrated subframe connectors for chassis rigidity, complemented by AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 355mm rotors
estetica: Install a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the Taiki's rotary-inspired aerodynamics, paired with a custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirror caps

Replace the OEM headlights with custom LED projectors by Morimoto (XB35 HID retrofit) and install a full Veilside Fortune 03-style rear wing with a carbon fiber Gurney flap, while integrating a custom LED taillight setup with sequential turn signals inspired by the Mazda Furai concept

Add a custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats with custom Taiki embroidery, a Nardi 350mm steering wheel with a quick-release hub, a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Seibon, and a custom digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada with data logging for boost, AFR, and oil pressure
